prompts.add_idle_animation:
standing in place at her food stall, head held perfectly still and facing
forward in the same direction as her torso, ponytail hanging straight down
the centerline of her back, eyes looking straight ahead, no head turning,
no looking around, no rubbernecking, gentle breathing only — shoulders rise
and fall subtly, arms remain at sides, feet planted, bandana knot stays
centered at the back of her head
prompts.add_walk_animation:
walking forward in the same direction her body is facing, head locked
forward and aligned with torso, eyes fixed straight ahead in the walking
direction, ponytail swinging straight down behind her (not sideways), no
head turning, no looking sideways, no glancing around, natural arm swing
opposite to leg stride, consistent gait and posture across all frames

description:
young taiwanese street-food vendor woman in her twenties, long black hair
pulled into a low ponytail straight down her back, light blue cotton bandana
tied as a forehead headband (knot at back, no dangling ends), white
short-sleeved button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to elbows, navy bib apron
with two square front pockets, dark slim trousers, black canvas sneakers,
slim athletic build, neutral focused expression, small silver hoop earrings,
arms relaxed at sides, no other accessories, no bag
